title: <div>Rising Tension  Andrew practices obsessively, pushing his body beyond its l
content:
Rising Tension Andrew practices obsessively, pushing his body beyond its limits.
Midpoint (False Victory) Andrew impresses Fletcher but is pushed harder than ever.
All is Lost Andrew is in a car accident but still tries to perform. Fletcher expels him.
Climax Andrew, after hitting rock bottom, returns for one final performance, proving his talent on his own terms.
Resolution Fletcher acknowledges him. They share a fleeting moment of mutual respect.

2. Real – Beat Breakdown

Beat Description
Opening Image Tomomi Nomiya, a former basketball player, reflects on the accident that changed his life.
Setup Three protagonists (Nomiya, Togawa, Takahashi) are introduced, each with struggles related to disability and self-worth.
Inciting Incident Togawa challenges the stigma around wheelchair basketball, forcing the others to confront their own limitations.
Rising Tension Nomiya searches for purpose. Takahashi, newly paralyzed, resents his condition. Togawa is determined to be the best.
Midpoint (False Victory) Nomiya starts to see basketball as his path again, but his past failures haunt him.
context: From document: The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: Inspiration, Structure… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/22)
